summary.shape_sentence: Early squeeze to a morning high, midday liquidation, then a choppy afternoon recovery that finished above the open but below the session peak.

goat.note: Standout bullish reversal from the deepest lunch-hour flush near 24,200.

red_circles.behavior: Clustered around upper retests after the morning high and during afternoon chop, marking failed pushes and shortable stalls.

green_circles.behavior: Appeared near pullback lows and were most effective after the midday flush, supporting the rebound.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply sat mainly in the 24,340-24,455 zone; repeatedly tested, briefly pierced, but mostly respected after the early high.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand sat mainly in the 24,190-24,280 zone; probed during the lunch flush, then held and supported recovery.

time_markers.10am_blue: Opening upside expansion was still active and price was near the session high zone.
time_markers.12pm_red: Market was rotating lower and setting up the lunch-hour flush.
time_markers.2pm_green: Rebound was in progress but already degrading into chop after the initial reclaim.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Session ended near 24,350 after late stabilization, above the open and below the morning high.

takeaway: Bullish-close rotational day with an early squeeze, lunch flush into demand, and afternoon reclaim that recovered well but did not fully break overhead supply.
